domains.label: Accounting
domains.description: General ledger, trial balance, journal entries, reconciliation, accounts receivable/payable aging, audit workpapers, internal controls, and compliance documentation.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de contabilidade.

domains.label: Banking
domains.description: Retail and commercial banking records including account statements, card statements, loan statements, and payment receipts.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de bancario.

domains.label: Billing
domains.description: Consumer and business billing documents including telecom, utilities, receipts, and invoices with due dates, balances, and charge components.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de cobranca.

domains.label: Education
domains.description: Academic records and school administration documents used to verify enrollment, performance, schedules, and aid awards.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de educacao.

domains.label: Finance
domains.description: Financial reporting, accounting, budgeting, treasury, and capital markets documentation.
domains.descriptionPt: Documentação de relatórios financeiros, contabilidade, orçamento, tesouraria e mercados de capitais.

domains.label: Housing
domains.description: Housing and property documents including lease summaries, rent receipts, mortgage statements, property tax bills, HOA statements, and inspection reports.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de moradia.

domains.label: HR and Payroll
domains.description: Employment and payroll documents including pay stubs, timesheets, benefits enrollment, expense reports, and verification letters.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de rh e folha.

domains.label: Identity
domains.description: Identity verification documents including personal IDs, passports, proof-of-address, and business registration certificates.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de identidade.

domains.label: Insurance
domains.description: Insurance policy interpretation, claims processing, benefits explanations, and premium billing extraction.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de seguros.

domains.label: Legal
domains.description: Contracts, agreements, litigation, regulatory compliance, and corporate governance documentation.
domains.descriptionPt: Documentação de contratos, acordos, litígios, conformidade regulatória e governança corporativa.

domains.label: Medical
domains.description: Clinical records, patient care documentation, diagnostic reports, and healthcare administration.
domains.descriptionPt: Registros clínicos, documentação de cuidados ao paciente, laudos diagnósticos e administração de saúde.

domains.label: Operations
domains.description: Business processes, IT infrastructure, project management, quality assurance, and operational governance.
domains.descriptionPt: Processos de negócios, infraestrutura de TI, gestão de projetos, garantia de qualidade e governança operacional.

domains.label: Tax
domains.description: Tax compliance, return filing, tax notices, payment slips, and property tax billing interpretation.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de tributario.

domains.label: Travel
domains.description: Travel booking and transport documents including itinerary, boarding pass, reservations, insurance, rentals, and visa receipts.
domains.descriptionPt: Perfil de dominio para interpretacao de documentos de viagem.
